list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Enhance level visuals and transition logic
- Added a skyscraper background decorator for Level 3. - Added a sun background decorator for Level 2. - Updated ScoreIndicator to display the current level number. - Implemented intermediate "Level Complete" screens between stages. - Added final "Game Completion" screen after Level 5. - Adjusted Level 4 ball velocity for vertical movement challenge.

task.summary:
Implement Game Engine, Paddle, and Brick Layout (Assignment 3)
- Created the Block class implementing Collidable and Sprite interfaces. - Implemented keyboard-controlled Paddle movement. - Developed the Game class to manage the animation loop and game environment. - Added logic for initializing the game level with borders and colored brick patterns. - Integrated collision detection between the ball, blocks, and paddle.

Implement Observer Pattern: Block Removal and Score Tracking (Assignment 4)
- Added HitListener and HitNotifier interfaces for event handling. - Implemented BlockRemover and BallRemover to manage object destruction. - Added Counter class and ScoreTrackingListener for game state management. - Created ScoreIndicator sprite to display current score on screen. - Updated Game class to handle winning/losing conditions based on counters.

Implement Animation Engine and Multiple Level Support (Assignment 4)
- Refactored Game into GameLevel using the Animation interface. - Created AnimationRunner to handle the central 60 FPS loop. - Implemented LevelInformation interface and created 5 distinct game levels. - Added GameFlow class to manage level transitions and persistent score. - Implemented PauseScreen, CountdownAnimation, and EndScreens. - Added KeyPressStoppableAnimation decorator with the logic to fix the key-press bug.

Enhance level visuals and transition logic
- Added a skyscraper background decorator for Level 3. - Added a sun background decorator for Level 2. - Updated ScoreIndicator to display the current level number. - Implemented intermediate "Level Complete" screens between stages. - Added final "Game Completion" screen after Level 5. - Adjusted Level 4 ball velocity for vertical movement challenge.

MESSAGE.value:
Implement Game Engine, Paddle, and Brick Layout (Assignment 3)
- Created the Block class implementing Collidable and Sprite interfaces. - Implemented keyboard-controlled Paddle movement. - Developed the Game class to manage the animation loop and game environment. - Added logic for initializing the game level with borders and colored brick patterns. - Integrated collision detection between the ball, blocks, and paddle.

Implement Observer Pattern: Block Removal and Score Tracking (Assignment 4)
- Added HitListener and HitNotifier interfaces for event handling. - Implemented BlockRemover and BallRemover to manage object destruction. - Added Counter class and ScoreTrackingListener for game state management. - Created ScoreIndicator sprite to display current score on screen. - Updated Game class to handle winning/losing conditions based on counters.

Implement Animation Engine and Multiple Level Support (Assignment 4)
- Refactored Game into GameLevel using the Animation interface. - Created AnimationRunner to handle the central 60 FPS loop. - Implemented LevelInformation interface and created 5 distinct game levels. - Added GameFlow class to manage level transitions and persistent score. - Implemented PauseScreen, CountdownAnimation, and EndScreens. - Added KeyPressStoppableAnimation decorator with the logic to fix the key-press bug.

Enhance level visuals and transition logic
- Added a skyscraper background decorator for Level 3. - Added a sun background decorator for Level 2. - Updated ScoreIndicator to display the current level number. - Implemented intermediate "Level Complete" screens between stages. - Added final "Game Completion" screen after Level 5. - Adjusted Level 4 ball velocity for vertical movement challenge.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Enhance level visuals and transition logic
- Added a skyscraper background decorator for Level 3. - Added a sun background decorator for Level 2. - Updated ScoreIndicator to display the current level number. - Implemented intermediate "Level Complete" screens between stages. - Added final "Game Completion" screen after Level 5. - Adjusted Level 4 ball velocity for vertical movement challenge.
